title: Hisuian Typhlosion Eyelid Fix
description: (Cobblemon) Fixes up the UVs and positioning on Hisuian Typhlosion's eyelids
body:
Temporary fix for Hisuian Typhlosion's eyelids' UVs on Cobblemon 1.5 to 1.6 (as of writing). This stops it from sleeping with one eye half-open and the other fully open.

![Typhlosion's sleeping animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BcBQCCmK/images/16567110470c3a91474abe0427a37101a7f2cd06_350.webp)
